keyFeatures.en: Free online photo editor with basic editing tools
keyFeatures.zh: 免费在线照片编辑器，提供基本编辑工具
AI驱动的背景去除和编辑

description.en: Unlimited photo editing with no watermarks, basic features only
description.zh: 无水印的无限照片编辑，仅包含基本功能

description.en: Advanced features, no watermarks, and additional tools
description.zh: 高级功能，无水印和额外工具

description.en: All features, no watermarks, and advanced tools
description.zh: 所有功能，无水印和高级工具

weaknesses.en: Limited advanced features compared to paid tiers
weaknesses.zh: 与付费套餐相比，高级功能有限

weaknesses.en: No specific mention of customer support hours
weaknesses.zh: 未明确说明客服支持时间

targetAudience.en: Amateurs and professionals who want a user-friendly photo editor
targetAudience.zh: 寻求用户友好照片编辑器的业余爱好者和专业人士

positioning.en: Fotor positions itself as a user-friendly and powerful photo editing tool for both amateurs and professionals
positioning.zh: Fotor 定位自己为适合业余爱好者和专业人士的用户友好且强大的照片编辑工具
